enchantment.linggango_tweaks.extra_prote: Reduces a small amount of the damage from most sources.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.extra_blast: Reduces a small amount of explosion damage.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.extra_fire_: Reduces a small amount of fire damage.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.extra_proje: Reduces a small amount of projectile damage.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.overclocked: Increases damage with every consecutive hit. Resets if you miss or stop firing.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.elemental_b: Grants a chance to inflict Bleeding, Vulnerability, and Armor Decrease on hit.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.shrapnel_pi: Each hit reduces target armor by 2%, stacking up to a high threshold.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.arcane_roun: Infuses bullets with mystical energy, dealing 20% bonus magic damage.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.vest_shredd: Allows bullets to ignore a portion of the target's defense per level.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.bullet_echo: Landed shots have a chance to strike the target a second time for 50% damage.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.rail_charge: Supercharges the weapon, increasing damage output by 200%.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.resource_ma: Successful hits have a chance to refund ammunition directly to your inventory.
enchantment.linggango_tweaks.explosive_r: Bullets explode on impact, dealing 30% of the bullet's damage to all nearby enemies.
tooltip.composite_material.disenchanted_: Hold this item in the main-hand and hold a piece of enchanted equipment in the off-hand, right-click to transfer all the enchantments to an Enchanted Book. It also works if you put an item right next to it.
